features: Detangle knots easily: getting rid of any knots, our detangling hair comb is suitable for using on wet hair before blow drying, leaving your hair silky soft and smooth, can nicely detangle your hair without damage

Comfortable to hold: designed with ideal gripping points, the anti-static comb requires less wrist stress and easy for styling, will not absorb conditioners, shampoos, oil, water, or others, making your hair more smooth and healthy, help you achieve a good-looking hairstyle
Pack of 2 Six Inch Pocket Combs

CS Beauty Pocket Comb is helpful to grasp and separate hair, it will avoid pulling, tangling or damaging the hair, which is more convenient for hairdressing work, the round teeth can smoothly pass through your hair without scratching or damaging your hair or scalp
Ideal comb for hair styling, suitable for professional or home use.
